---
title: "Elizabeth Dyson"
---

## Elizabeth Dyson

**Dates:** (1794/5-?1868)

**Maiden name:** (Dyson)

### Description

wife and cousin of the Rev. Charles Dyson

### Biography

They married at Wexham 21 April 1819 [IGI; his ODNB entry]

### Letters

- Letter from [November 1868]
- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]
- Letter from Jan 7th [1867]
- Letter from Saturday Evening Oct 21st 1865
- Letter from July 30th [1863]
- Letter from May 23d 1861
- Letter from July 3d 1860
- Letter from May 16th 1860
- Letter from 20 October [1850]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
